zh.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: 西班牙桑坦德瓦爾德奧列亞亨斯特洛薩 德 拉斯 昆塔尼利亞斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rodrigo Nuñez de Henestrosa於大約1130年出生在西班牙桑坦德瓦爾德奧列亞亨斯特洛薩 德 拉斯 昆塔尼利亞斯時，他的父親Nuño Diaz de Henestrosa34歲，母親Evira Sanchez de Rojas y Gil43歲。他和Elvira Gil De Ansurez至少有1個兒子。他去世於1168年在西班牙享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: Nuñez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Rafael, Pedro, Jorge, Ramon.  Portuguese Guilherme, Joaquim, Vasco, Wenceslao.
Spanish (Núñez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Nuño (see Nuno ).

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Nuno
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Salvador, Alfredo, Carlos, Francisco, JoseLuis, Miguel, Luis, Manuel, Alfonso.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo.
Spanish (Nuño), Portuguese, and Galician: from a medieval personal name, first attested in the Latin form Nunnus, of uncertain derivation.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rodrigo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. It was the name of the last king of the Visigoths, defeated by the Moors in 711 .

en.lifeSummary: When Rodrigo Nuñez de Henestrosa was born about 1130, in Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeolea, Santander, Spain, his father, Nuño Diaz de Henestrosa, was 34 and his mother, Evira Sanchez de Rojas y Gil, was 43. He had at least 1 son with Elvira Gil De Ansurez. He died in 1168, in Spain, at the age of 39.

fr.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeolea, Santander, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rodrigo Nuñez de Henestrosa est né environ 1130, à Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeolea, Santander, Espagne, son père, Nuño Diaz de Henestrosa, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Evira Sanchez de Rojas y Gil, avait 43 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Elvira Gil De Ansurez. Il est décédé en 1168, à Espagne, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rodrigo Nuñez de Henestrosa um 1130 in Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeolea, Santander, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nuño Diaz de Henestrosa 34 und seine Mutter Evira Sanchez de Rojas y Gil 43. Er hatte mit Elvira Gil De Ansurez mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1168 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Spanien.

ko.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: 스페인 산탠더 발데오리 헨스트로자 데 라스 퀸탠이라스
ko.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Nuñez de Henestrosa(이)가 대략 1130년 스페인 산탠더 발데오리 헨스트로자 데 라스 퀸탠이라스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nuño Diaz de Henestrosa(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Evira Sanchez de Rojas y Gil(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Elvira Gil De Ansurez(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1168년 스페인에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Henestrosa de las Quintanillas, Valdeole: хинестроса де лас куинтаниллас, валдеолеа, сантандир, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rodrigo Nuñez de Henestrosa родился около 1130 г. в местности хинестроса де лас куинтаниллас, валдеолеа, сантандир, Испания, его отцу по имени Nuño Diaz de Henestrosa было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Evira Sanchez de Rojas y Gil, 43. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Elvira Gil De Ansurez. Он умер в 1168 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 39 лет.
